arts.ttl: 'Very important': Arteta suggests Arsenal have signed a player who's solved a big 'instability' in the team
arts.sum: Arsenal are in fine form at present as they continue to challenge for the Premier League title and are also flying in the Champions League....

arts.ttl: Everton without three stars for Arsenal as Mikel Arteta handed major injury boost
arts.sum: Arsenal have been boosted by the knowledge that Everton will be without three players for Saturday's Premier League match at the Emirates Stadium. Arsenal, meanwhile, have injury doubts of their own with Gabriel Magalhaes, Riccardo Calafiori and Oleksandr Zinchenko all absent for Wednesday's clash with AS Monaco.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line ups vs Everton as Gabriel returns, Lewis-Skelly decision made
arts.sum: Doyle's XI vs Everton: Raya; Partey, Saliba, Gabriel, Timber; Rice, Odegaard, Merino; Saka, Havertz, Trossard. Against an Everton side likely to sit back a bit, I'm picking Leandro Trossard on the left for the link-up play he'll bring in breaking down a stubborn defence, with Gabriel Martinelli able to come off the bench and add some pace as the visitors begin to flag physically late in the game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta claims historic change to football matches is 'real possibility'
arts.sum: A number of big name footballers and managers have spoken out about the dangers of the ever-expanding schedule at the elite level and Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta believed matches could become shorter in the future

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka keeps mystery girlfriend private – and Arsenal star doesn't even follow her online
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka and his partner Tolami Benson have kept their romance under wraps and don't follow each other on Instagram despite reportedly dating for the last four years

arts.ttl: Saturday's Premier League predictions including Arsenal vs. Everton
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Arsenal vs. Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton deserve so much better but quiet truth about Farhad Moshiri underlines takeover hope
arts.sum: ECHO Everton reporter Chris Beesley discusses the move towards the completion of the Friedkin Group's takeover in this week's Royal Blue column

arts.ttl: ‘I played for Liverpool, Chelsea and Arsenal – this was the best transfer of my career’
arts.sum: Yossi Benayoun may be best remembered for his three-year stint with Liverpool between 2007 and 2010, but the Israeli midfielder has admitted that signing for a different club was his best decision

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche's has 'gut feeling' about secret weapon Everton could unleash against Arsenal
arts.sum: Sean Dyche has been speaking about Armando Broja and set-pieces ahead of Everton's trip to Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without four players vs Everton as Gabriel decision 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Speaking during his pre-match press conference on Friday, Arteta said: "We are used to playing every three days, the boys trained today and they are really fired up and really looking forward to the game and understanding it is a tough opponent and that we will have to be at our best to beat them." Arsenal won both matches against Everton last campaign but Mikel Arteta believes it will be a tough test on Saturday against Sean Dyche's side.
